    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    actionDescLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Label showing action description text.
    actionNameLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Label showing the selected action name.
    actionOrder - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Turn order priority or sequence position used by the battle system.
    activeHeroIndex - Variable in class logic.BattleModel
    Index of the currently active hero in the hero team list.
    addCountReroll(int) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Adds to the reroll usage count.
    addStageCounter(int) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Adds to the stage counter.
    afterHeroAction() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Executes post-hero action logic: Clears pending skill Checks victory condition Advances to next hero if available Otherwise moves to BattleStage.MONSTER_TURN
    AllHero - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    List of all heroes available for selection at the start of a game.
    ALLY_ALL - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    All allied heroes will be targeted automatically.
    ALLY_ONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    A single ally must be selected as the target.
    animateTo(double) - Method in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Animates the HP bar to a new HP value.
    animateTo(double) - Method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    application - package application
     
    applyAtkBuff(double, double, int) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Applies a temporary attack buff.
    applyBaseStats() - Method in class component.Monster
    Applies base stats according to this monster's type.
    Archer - Class in component.heroes
    Archer hero class.
    Archer() - Constructor for class component.heroes.Archer
    Constructs an Archer hero with predefined base stats and cooldown values.
    ARCHER - Enum constant in enum class logic.Character
    Ranged damage dealer that attacks enemies from a distance.
    atk - Variable in class component.Unit
    Base attack value
    atkBuffTurns - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Remaining turns for the current attack buff (>= 0).
    atkFlat - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Flat attack bonus buff (>= 0.0).
    atkMul - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Attack multiplier buff (>= 1.0).
    attack(Unit) - Method in class component.Monster
    Performs a basic monster attack using its current attack value.
    attack(Unit, double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Performs an elemental attack on a target.

    B

    barH - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    barH - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    barW - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    barW - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    BATTLE - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Active battle phase controlled by the BattleEngine.
    BattleEngine - Class in logic
    Core turn-based battle controller for the game.
    BattleEngine(BattleModel) - Constructor for class logic.BattleEngine
    Creates a new battle engine and initializes the battle state.
    BattleListener - Interface in logic
    Listener interface used by BattleEngine to communicate with the UI layer.
    BattleModel - Class in logic
    Data model representing the current state of a battle.
    BattleModel(List<Heroes>, List<Monster>) - Constructor for class logic.BattleModel
    Constructs a battle model with the provided hero and monster teams.
    BattleScene - Class in gui
    The BattleScene class is responsible for rendering and controlling the graphical user interface of the battle phase in the game.
    BattleScene() - Constructor for class gui.BattleScene
     
    BattleScene.HpBarUI - Class in gui
    Represents a visual HP bar component for a unit.
    BattleScene.SkillInfo - Class in gui
    Holds display name and description for each action type for a single hero.
    BattleSceneTemp - Class in gui
     
    BattleSceneTemp() - Constructor for class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI - Class in gui
     
    BattleStage - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the different stages of the battle state machine.
    BattleStage() - Constructor for enum class logic.BattleStage
     
    beginBattle() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Begins the battle by emitting the current stage and a model update to the listener.
    bg - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    bg - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    bgmPlayer - Static variable in class logic.MusicPlayer
     
    border - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    border - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    bowStack - Variable in class component.heroes.Archer
    Current bow stack (1–5).
    BTN_GLOW - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Glow effect for hovered skill buttons.
    buff(Unit) - Method in interface component.Buffing
    Applies a buff effect to the specified unit.
    buff(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Caster
    Applies a temporary attack buff to a hero target.
    buff(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Applies a temporary attack buff to a hero target.
    Buffing - Interface in component
    Represents a buffing capability.
    buildHeroElementOverlay(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Creates a top-left overlay icon for a hero showing: element icon and hero icon.
    buildMonsterElementOverlay(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Creates a top-right overlay icon for a monster showing: element icon and monster sprite icon.
    buildSkillDescriptionPanel() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds the bottom-right description panel that shows action name and description based on the currently active hero and the selected skill type.
    buildSkillPanel() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds the bottom-left skill button panel containing: normal, skill, ultimate, and cancel buttons.
    buildStageCounterPanel(GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds a top-center panel that displays the stage counter.
    buildUnits() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds all unit cards for heroes and monsters one time.
    buildUnits() - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     

    C

    CANCEL_BTN_IMG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
     
    cancelBtn - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Cancel button for exiting target or ally selection.
    canUseSkill() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Checks if skill is usable (cooldown is 0).
    canUseUlt() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Checks if ultimate is usable (cooldown is 0).
    Caster - Class in component.heroes
    Caster hero class.
    Caster() - Constructor for class component.heroes.Caster
    Constructs a Caster hero with predefined base stats and cooldown values.
    CASTER - Enum constant in enum class logic.Character
    Magic-based attacker that specializes in area damage and offensive spells that often target multiple enemies.
    castSkill(SkillType, Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Dispatches skill execution based on skill type.
    castSkill(SkillType, Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Caster
    Dispatches skill execution based on skill type.
    castSkill(SkillType, Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Fighter
    Dispatches skill execution based on skill type.
    castSkill(SkillType, Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Dispatches skill execution based on skill type.
    castSkill(SkillType, Target) - Method in class component.Unit
    Casts a skill.
    Character - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the different hero archetypes available in the battle system.
    Character() - Constructor for enum class logic.Character
     
    CharacterSelectionScene - Class in gui
    The CharacterSelectionScene class renders the team selection screen.
    CharacterSelectionScene() - Constructor for class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
     
    CHECK_END - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Intermediate stage where the engine checks victory or defeat conditions.
    checkFullTeam() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Checks whether the player's team is at maximum capacity.
    checkSkillTarget(Heroes, SkillType) - Static method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Determines the targeting behavior for a hero class and skill type.
    clamp01(double) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Clamps a double to the range 0 to 1.
    clamp01(double) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    clearMonsterTeam() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Clears the monster team list.
    clearSkillButtonEffects() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Clears glow effects from skill buttons.
    component - package component
     
    component.heroes - package component.heroes
     
    COUNT_REROLL - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Number of rerolls already used.
    createButton(String) - Static method in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Creates a generic image-based button used in the selection UI.
    createButton(String) - Static method in class gui.DefeatScene
    Creates an image-based button with hover scaling and press translation animations.
    createButton(String) - Static method in class gui.RollElementScene
    Creates an image-based JavaFX button with hover glow, hover scale, and press translation animations.
    createButton(String) - Static method in class gui.UpgradeScene
    Creates an image-based button with hover scaling, glow effect, and press animation.
    createButton(String) - Static method in class gui.VictoryScene
    Creates an image-based button with hover scaling, glow effect, and press animation.
    createCharacterButton(String, Heroes) - Static method in class gui.UpgradeScene
    Creates a selectable hero icon button for upgrade selection.
    createCharacterButton(String, String, int) - Static method in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Creates a clickable hero portrait button that can expand into an information panel.
    createCharacterImage(String) - Static method in class gui.VictoryScene
    Creates a hero icon ImageView for display on the victory screen.
    createImageButton(String, double, double) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Creates an image-based JavaFX button with hover and press animations.
    createStartButton() - Static method in class gui.StartScene
    Creates the main menu "Start" button as an image-based button with animations.
    currentHp - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    currentHp - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    currentTurnHero - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Currently active hero during the player's decision stage.

    D

    DARK - Enum constant in enum class component.Element
     
    def - Variable in class component.Unit
    Defense value used to reduce incoming damage
    DEFEAT - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Final state triggered when all heroes are defeated.
    DefeatScene - Class in gui
    The DefeatScene class renders the defeat screen shown when the player loses a battle.
    DefeatScene() - Constructor for class gui.DefeatScene
     
    desc(SkillType) - Method in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
    Returns the display description for a given skill type.
    DESC_PANEL_BG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
     
    descPanel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    HUD panel holding skill descriptions.
    discription - Static variable in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Static text data used to display hero details in the portrait scroll overlay.
    dmg - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    dmg - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    dmgReduction(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Reduces incoming damage using defense.

    E

    effectiveAtk() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Computes effective attack value including current buffs.
    element - Variable in class component.Unit
    Elemental affinity of this unit
    Element - Enum Class in component
    Represents elemental types used in the combat system.
    Element() - Constructor for enum class component.Element
     
    emitLog(String) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Emits a log message event to the listener.
    emitState(BattleStage) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Emits a stage change event to the listener.
    emitUpdate() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Emits a model update event to the listener.
    ENEMY_ALL - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    All enemies will be targeted automatically.
    ENEMY_ONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    A single enemy must be selected as the target.
    engine - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Battle engine controlling battle flow.
    engine - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    executeMonsterTurnAndContinue() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Called by the UI after all monster attacks have completed.

    F

    Fighter - Class in component.heroes
    Fighter hero class.
    Fighter() - Constructor for class component.heroes.Fighter
    Constructs a Fighter hero with predefined base stats and cooldown values.
    FIGHTER - Enum constant in enum class logic.Character
    Balanced melee fighter specializing in direct combat and single-target damage against enemies.
    fill - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    fill - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    findNextAliveHeroIndex(int) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Finds the next alive hero index after the given index in round-robin order.
    FIRE - Enum constant in enum class component.Element
     

    G

    GameEngine - Class in logic
    Global game controller responsible for managing game-wide state outside of battle.
    GameEngine() - Constructor for class logic.GameEngine
    Constructs the game engine and starts a new game.
    GAMEENGINE - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Reference to the shared game engine instance used for stage counter and team state.
    gameState - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Current high-level game state.
    GameState - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the high-level states of the game lifecycle.
    GameState() - Constructor for enum class logic.GameState
     
    getActionOrder() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Returns the action order of this hero.
    getActiveHero() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns the currently active hero, or null if the active index is invalid or the hero is dead.
    getActiveHeroIndex() - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Returns the index of the currently active hero.
    getActiveMonster(int) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns a monster at a given index, or null if index is invalid or the monster is dead.
    getAtk() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getAtkBuffTurns() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    getAtkFlat() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    getAtkMul() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    getAvailableHeroes() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the list of heroes that can be selected by the player.
    getBattleStage() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns the current battle stage.
    getBowStack() - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Returns current bow stack value.
    getCountReroll() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the number of rerolls already used.
    getDef() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getElement() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getElementImage(Element) - Static method in class logic.RandomElementGenerator
    Returns the image corresponding to a specific element type.
    getGameEngine() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the current game engine reference for this battle scene.
    getGameState() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the current game state.
    getHERO_TEAM() - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Returns the list of heroes participating in the battle.
    getHeroClass() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Returns hero class label.
    getHeroTEAM() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the current player hero team.
    getHp() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getHpPercent() - Method in class component.Unit
    Returns HP percentage (0–100).
    getMaxHp() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getMaxReroll() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the maximum number of rerolls allowed.
    getModel() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns the battle model used by this engine.
    getModifierAgainst(Element) - Method in enum class component.Element
    Returns the damage modifier when this element attacks the target element.
    getMONSTER_TEAM() - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Returns the list of monsters participating in the battle.
    getMonsterFactory() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the MonsterFactory used by the game.
    getMonsterTeam() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the current monster team.
    getName() - Method in class component.Unit
     
    getNameByType(int) - Static method in class component.Monster
    Returns the monster display name for the given type.
    getPendingSkill() - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Returns the skill currently selected by the player that is waiting for target resolution.
    getRandomElement(ArrayList<? extends Unit>) - Static method in class logic.RandomElementGenerator
    Assigns random elements to the provided list of units.
    getShield() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Returns current shield value.
    getSkillCdRemain() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    getStage() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the current stage reference for this battle scene.
    getStage() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns the current battle stage.
    getStageCounter() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the current stage counter.
    getTeamSize() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the current team size.
    getTurnCounter() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Returns the current turn counter.
    getUltCdRemain() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    getUpgradeHero() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Returns the hero selected for upgrade.
    group - Variable in class component.Target
    Group of target units (used for multi-target skills).
    gui - package gui
     

    H

    handleEndTurnAttackImage(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Handles attack image transitions when a turn ends.
    handleEndTurnAttackImage(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
    Core logic: 1) Hero->Hero: when active hero changes during hero decision stages -> previous hero ended turn => show attack on previous hero 2) Last hero: when stage transitions into MONSTER_TURN -> last hero ended hero phase => show attack on heroBeforeMonsterTurn 3) Do NOT trigger after monster turn ends (MONSTER_TURN -> HERO_CHOOSE_...) because we never fire there.
    heal(Unit) - Method in interface component.Healing
    Applies a healing effect to the specified target unit.
    heal(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Fighter
    Heals the specified unit.
    heal(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Heals the specified unit.
    healAmount(Unit, double) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Heals the target by the given amount (clamped to non-negative), without exceeding the target's maximum HP.
    Healing - Interface in component
    Represents a healing capability.
    HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Player selects an ally hero as the target of a skill (for example healing or buffs).
    HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Player chooses which skill the active hero will use.
    HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Player selects a monster target for a single-target skill or attack.
    HERO_RESOLVE_ACTION - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    The engine resolves the chosen hero action and applies its effects.
    HERO_SKILLS - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map of hero name to skill description data used by the HUD.
    HERO_TEAM - Variable in class logic.BattleModel
    List of heroes participating in the battle, sorted by action order.
    heroAttackImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the attack sprite image for a hero.
    heroAttackImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroBaseImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the base hero image appropriate for current hero state: dead, shielded, or idle.
    heroBeforeMonsterTurn - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    The hero that ended the hero phase before the monster turn begins.
    heroBeforeMonsterTurn - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroBox - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Container holding hero cards and interactions.
    heroBox - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroCardMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from hero to its UI card node.
    heroCardMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroClass - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Hero class label (e.g., "Archer", "Tank").
    heroDeadImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the dead sprite image for a hero.
    heroElementBoxTopLeft - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Top-left icon row for hero elements.
    heroElementIconMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from hero to its displayed element icon image view.
    heroElementPanelTopLeft - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Top-left panel holding hero element icons.
    Heroes - Class in component.heroes
    Abstract base class for all playable heroes.
    Heroes(String, double, double, double) - Constructor for class component.heroes.Heroes
    Constructs a hero with base combat stats.
    heroHpMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from hero to its HP bar UI wrapper.
    heroHpMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroIdleImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the idle sprite image for a hero.
    heroIdleImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroImageMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from hero to its image view used for sprite swaps (idle, attack, dead, shield).
    heroImageMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    heroNameLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Label showing current hero name for the skill description HUD.
    heroShieldImg(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the shield sprite image for a hero.
    heroTempAnimMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Temporary per-hero animations (used to revert attack image back to base).
    heroTempAnimMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    HOVER_GLOW - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Glow effect for hovered selectable cards during target selection.
    HOVER_GLOW - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    hp - Variable in class component.Unit
    Current health points
    HpBarUI(double, double) - Constructor for class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Creates an HP bar UI for a unit.
    HpBarUI(double, double) - Constructor for class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     

    I

    increaseBowStack() - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Increases bowStack by 1 up to a maximum of 5.
    initHeroSkillsOnce() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Initializes the hero skill description map if it has not been initialized yet.
    initTopCornerElementUI(AnchorPane) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Initializes the top-corner element UI panels and places them in the root anchor pane.
    isDead() - Method in class component.Unit
    Checks whether this unit is dead.
    isHeroAllDead() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Checks whether all heroes are dead.
    isHeroAllDead() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Checks whether all heroes in the player team are dead.
    isHeroDecisionStage(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns true if the stage is a hero decision stage where player input is expected.
    isHeroDecisionStage(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    isInTeam(Heroes) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Checks whether a hero is already included in the player's team.
    isMany() - Method in class component.Target
    Checks whether this Target represents multiple units.
    isMonsterAllDead() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Checks whether all monsters are dead.
    isMonsterAllDead() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Checks whether all monsters in the monster team are dead.
    isSingle() - Method in class component.Target
    Checks whether this Target represents a single unit.

    L

    lastActiveHero - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    The active hero at the previous stage.
    lastActiveHero - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    lastStage - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Previous stage used to detect stage transitions and play end-turn animations.
    lastStage - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    LIGHT - Enum constant in enum class component.Element
     
    listener - Variable in class logic.BattleEngine
    Listener used to notify the UI about state changes, model updates, and logs.
    loadImageSafe(String, String) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Attempts to load an image from a resource path.
    loadImageSafe(String, String) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    logic - package logic
     
    logLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Text label for displaying battle log or guidance messages.
    logLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    LOSE_TURN - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Stage indicating that all heroes are defeated and the player loses the battle.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
     
    Main - Class in application
     
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    many() - Method in class component.Target
    Returns the list of targets.
    many(List<? extends Unit>) - Static method in class component.Target
    Creates a Target representing multiple units.
    MAX_REROLL - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Maximum number of rerolls allowed during hero selection or related UI.
    MAX_TEAM_SIZE - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Maximum number of heroes allowed in the player's team.
    maxHp - Variable in class component.Unit
    Maximum health points
    maxHp - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    maxHp - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    model - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Battle model providing teams and indexes.
    model - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    model - Variable in class logic.BattleEngine
    Battle data model containing teams, indexes, and pending action state.
    Monster - Class in component
    Represents an enemy monster unit.
    Monster(int) - Constructor for class component.Monster
    Constructs a Monster of the given type.
    MONSTER_FACTORY - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Monster factory used to generate monsters for each stage.
    MONSTER_TEAM - Variable in class logic.BattleModel
    List of monsters participating in the battle.
    MONSTER_TEAM - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Current monster team for the current stage.
    MONSTER_TURN - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Monsters perform their attacks after all heroes finish their actions for the round.
    monsterAttackImg(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the attack sprite image for a monster.
    monsterAttackOne(Monster) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Performs exactly one monster attack so the UI can animate attacks one by one.
    monsterBaseImg(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the base monster image appropriate for current monster state: dead or idle.
    monsterBox - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Container holding monster cards and interactions.
    monsterBox - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    monsterCardMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from monster to its UI card node.
    monsterCardMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    monsterDeadImg(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the dead sprite image for a monster.
    monsterElementBoxTopRight - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Top-right icon row for monster elements.
    monsterElementIconMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from monster to its displayed element icon image view.
    monsterElementPanelTopRight - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Top-right panel holding monster element icons.
    MonsterFactory - Class in component
    Factory class responsible for spawning enemy monster teams.
    MonsterFactory() - Constructor for class component.MonsterFactory
    Constructs a MonsterFactory.
    monsterHpMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from monster to its HP bar UI wrapper.
    monsterHpMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    monsterIdleImg(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the idle sprite image for a monster.
    monsterImageMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Map from monster to its image view used for sprite swaps (idle, attack, dead).
    monsterImageMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    monsterTempAnimMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Temporary per-monster animations (used to revert attack image back to base).
    monsterType - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    monsterTypeMap - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Monster type folder mapping used to resolve correct resource paths for each monster card.
    monsterTypeName(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Returns the resolved monster type folder name for a monster.
    MusicPlayer - Class in logic
     
    MusicPlayer() - Constructor for class logic.MusicPlayer
     

    N

    name - Variable in class component.Unit
    Display name of the unit
    name(SkillType) - Method in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
    Returns the display name for a given skill type.
    NATURE - Enum constant in enum class component.Element
     
    newGame() - Method in class logic.GameEngine
    Resets the entire game state to start a brand new game.
    nextBtnOnClickHandler(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.UpgradeScene
    Handles the "Next" button action for upgrading a hero.
    node() - Method in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Builds the JavaFX node representing this HP bar, including the text overlay.
    node() - Method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    No target selection is required.
    NORMAL_ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class logic.SkillType
    Basic attack that targets a single enemy and has no cooldown.
    NORMAL_BTN_IMG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
     
    normalAttack(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Performs a normal attack using the hero's effective attack value.
    normalAttack(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Caster
    Performs a normal attack using the hero's effective attack value.
    normalAttack(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Fighter
    Performs a normal attack using the hero's effective attack value.
    normalAttack(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Performs the hero's normal/basic attack.
    normalAttack(Unit) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Performs a normal attack using the hero's effective attack value.
    normalBtn - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Action buttons for the hero turn.
    normalBtn - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    normalDesc - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     
    normalizeType(int) - Static method in class component.Monster
    Normalizes a type value into range 1..3.
    normalName - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     

    O

    onCancelSelection() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Cancels target or ally selection and returns to BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL.
    onClickChoosingAlly(Heroes) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Handles the UI action where the player selects an ally hero target.
    onClickChoosingTarget(int) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Handles the UI action where the player selects a monster target by index.
    onClickHeroSkill(SkillType) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Handles the UI action where the active hero chooses a skill type.
    one(Unit) - Static method in class component.Target
    Creates a Target representing a single unit.
    onHeroTurnStartedForHud(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Called when a hero turn starts to update HUD state and default description selection.
    onLog(String) - Method in interface logic.BattleListener
    Called when the engine emits a log message.
    onModelUpdated() - Method in interface logic.BattleListener
    Called when the underlying battle model has been updated.
    onStateChanged(BattleStage) - Method in interface logic.BattleListener
    Called when the battle stage changes.

    P

    pauseMusic() - Static method in class logic.MusicPlayer
     
    pendingSkill - Variable in class logic.BattleModel
    Skill selected by the player that is waiting for target resolution.
    pickBtnOnClickHandler(GameEngine, Heroes, Button) - Static method in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Handles the Choose or Discard button behavior for a specific hero.
    pickRandomAliveHero() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Picks a random alive hero from the hero team.
    playAllMonstersAttack(List<Monster>, int, Runnable, Consumer<Monster>) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Plays attack animations for all monsters sequentially.
    playHitAnimation(Region) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Plays a short hit animation (shake) on a unit card.
    playHitAnimation(Region) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    playMusic(GameState) - Static method in class logic.MusicPlayer
     
    playSingleMonsterAttack(Monster, Runnable, Runnable) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Plays a single monster attack sequence: set attack sprite, wait until hit timing, apply damage, update UI, then continue.

    R

    RandomElementGenerator - Class in logic
    Utility class responsible for assigning random elements to units and retrieving corresponding element images.
    RandomElementGenerator() - Constructor for class logic.RandomElementGenerator
     
    rebuildTopCornerElementIcons() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Rebuilds element icon overlays for both heroes and monsters in the top corners.
    refreshButtons() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Refreshes the enabled and disabled state of action buttons based on current stage and cooldowns.
    refreshButtons() - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    refreshInteractivity(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Updates UI interactivity and triggers monster animations based on the battle stage.
    refreshInteractivity(BattleStage) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    refreshTopCornerElementIcons() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Refreshes only the element icon images in the top corners based on current model elements.
    refreshTurnGlow() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Refreshes the glow highlight for the currently active hero during hero decision stages.
    refreshTurnGlow() - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    resetAfterTurn() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Resets hero state after a stage/turn.
    resetAllCooldowns() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Resets both skill and ultimate cooldowns to 0 (usable).
    resetBow() - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Resets bowStack back to 1.
    resetCurrentSelection - Static variable in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    A callback used to reset the currently expanded hero portrait, ensuring that only one hero information panel is expanded at a time.
    resetCurrentSelection - Static variable in class gui.UpgradeScene
    Stores a runnable that resets the previously selected hero button.
    resetHeroShield() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Resets all hero shields to 0.
    resolveHeroAction(Heroes, Target, SkillType) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Resolves a hero action by delegating to Unit.castSkill(SkillType, Target).
    resumeMusic() - Static method in class logic.MusicPlayer
     
    rng - Variable in class component.MonsterFactory
    Random number generator for monster type selection.
    ROLL_ELEMENT - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    State where the player rolls or assigns elemental bonuses to heroes before combat begins.
    rollBtnHandler(Text, HBox) - Static method in class gui.RollElementScene
    Handles the reroll button logic for hero elements.
    RollElementScene - Class in gui
    The RollElementScene class renders the element rolling screen shown before a battle.
    RollElementScene() - Constructor for class gui.RollElementScene
     
    rollType(int, int) - Method in class component.MonsterFactory
    Rolls (selects) a monster type based on stage-dependent weights.
    round(Rectangle) - Method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     

    S

    safeGetActiveHero() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Safely gets the active hero from the model using the engine index.
    safeGetActiveHero() - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    scale() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Scales hero stats multiplicatively.
    scaleToStage(int) - Method in class component.Monster
    Scales this monster's stats to match the specified stage.
    SELECT_TEAM - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Player selects heroes to form the team before entering battle.
    selectedSkillType - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Skill type currently displayed in the description panel (hover-based).
    SELF - Enum constant in enum class logic.TargetType
    The skill targets the hero casting the ability.
    setActionOrder(Integer) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Sets the action order used by the battle system.
    setActiveHeroIndex(int) - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Sets the index of the currently active hero.
    setAtk(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets attack value (must be >= 0)
    setAtkBuffTurns(int) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    setAtkFlat(double) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    setAtkMul(double) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
     
    setBattleStage(BattleStage) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Sets the current battle stage without emitting any events.
    setCountReroll(int) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Sets the reroll usage count.
    setDef(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets defense value (must be >= 0)
    setElement(Element) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets elemental type
    setGameState(GameState) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Sets the current game state.
    setHeroClass(String) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Sets hero class label.
    setHeroInputEnabled(boolean) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Enables or disables all hero-related input controls and unit boxes.
    setHeroInputEnabled(boolean) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    setHp(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets HP, clamped between 0 and maxHp.
    setInstant(double) - Method in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Sets the HP bar immediately without animation.
    setInstant(double) - Method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    setListener(BattleListener) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Sets the listener used by the UI layer to receive engine events.
    setMaxHp(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets maximum HP.
    setMonsterTeam() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Spawns a new monster team for the current stage and stores it in GameEngine.MONSTER_TEAM.
    setName(String) - Method in class component.Unit
    Sets unit name
    setPendingSkill(SkillType) - Method in class logic.BattleModel
    Sets the pending skill selected by the player.
    setShield(double) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Sets shield value (clamped to non-negative).
    setStageCounter(int) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Sets the current stage counter.
    setTurnCounter(int) - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Sets the current turn counter.
    setUpgradeHero(Heroes) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Sets the hero that will be upgraded.
    setupHoverGlow(Region, BooleanSupplier) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Adds hover glow behavior to a node while a condition is true.
    setupHoverGlow(Region, BooleanSupplier) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    shield - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Current shield value.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Initializes and displays the battle scene.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Displays the character selection scene on the provided stage.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.DefeatScene
    Displays the defeat scene on the provided stage.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.RollElementScene
    Displays the roll element scene on the provided stage.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.UpgradeScene
    Shows the upgrade scene on the given stage.
    show(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.VictoryScene
    Shows the victory screen.
    showAttackFor1_5s(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Temporarily shows the hero attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
    showAttackFor1_5s(Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    showMenu(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.StartScene
    Displays the main menu on the provided JavaFX stage.
    showMonsterAttackFor1s(Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Temporarily shows the monster attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
    single - Variable in class component.Target
    Single target unit (used for single-target skills).
    single() - Method in class component.Target
    Returns the single target.
    skill(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Uses the Archer's skill ability.
    skill(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Caster
    Uses the Caster's skill ability.
    skill(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Fighter
    Uses the Fighter's skill ability.
    skill(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Uses the hero's skill action.
    skill(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Uses the Tank's skill ability.
    SKILL - Enum constant in enum class logic.SkillType
    Standard hero ability that may have a cooldown and specific targeting rules.
    SKILL_BTN_IMG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
     
    SKILL_PANEL_BG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
     
    skillBtn - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Action buttons for the hero turn.
    skillBtn - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    skillCdMax - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Maximum cooldown value for skill.
    skillCdRemain - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Remaining cooldown turns for skill (0 means usable).
    skillDesc - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     
    SkillInfo(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
    Creates a skill info bundle for one hero.
    skillName - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     
    skillPanel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    HUD panel holding skill buttons.
    SkillType - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the different types of actions a hero can perform during battle.
    SkillType() - Constructor for enum class logic.SkillType
     
    spawnMonster(int) - Method in class component.MonsterFactory
    Spawns a monster team scaled to the specified stage.
    stage - Variable in class logic.BattleEngine
    Current stage of the battle state machine.
    STAGE - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    JavaFX stage currently showing the battle UI.
    STAGE_COUNTER - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Current stage number (used for difficulty progression and monster spawning).
    stageCounterLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Label showing current stage number.
    stageCounterPanelTopCenter - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Top-center panel showing stage counter.
    stageLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Text label for displaying current BattleStage.
    stageLabel - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
     
    START_BATTLE - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Initial stage when the battle begins and the system prepares the first turn.
    START_GAME - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Initial state when the game starts before any interaction occurs.
    startBtnOnClickHandler(Stage, GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.CharacterSelectionScene
    Handles the Start button click.
    StartScene - Class in gui
    The StartScene class renders the main menu of the game.
    StartScene() - Constructor for class gui.StartScene
     
    stopMusic() - Static method in class logic.MusicPlayer
     
    styleButton(Button) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     

    T

    takeDamage(double) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Applies damage to this hero, consuming shield first.
    takeDamage(double) - Method in class component.Unit
    Applies incoming damage to this unit after defense reduction.
    Tank - Class in component.heroes
    Tank hero class.
    Tank() - Constructor for class component.heroes.Tank
    Constructs a Tank hero with predefined base stats and cooldown values.
    TANK - Enum constant in enum class logic.Character
    Defensive frontline hero that protects allies through shields, healing, or supportive abilities.
    Target - Class in component
    Represents a target container used for skill execution.
    Target(Unit, List<? extends Unit>) - Constructor for class component.Target
    Private constructor.
    TargetType - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the targeting rules used by skills and abilities in battle.
    TargetType() - Constructor for enum class logic.TargetType
     
    TEAM - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Current selected hero team for the player.
    TEAM_SIZE - Static variable in class component.MonsterFactory
    Fixed number of monsters spawned per team.
    text - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
     
    text - Variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    tickCooldowns() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Decreases cooldown counters by 1 turn, if they are greater than 0.
    tickCooldownsForHeroes() - Method in class logic.BattleEngine
    Decrements cooldown counters for all alive heroes.
    toggleTeamMember(Heroes) - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Adds or removes a hero from the player's team.
    triggerSkillCd() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Starts/refreshes skill cooldown to its max value.
    triggerUltCd() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Starts/refreshes ultimate cooldown to its max value.
    TURN_GLOW - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene
    Glow effect for currently active hero.
    TURN_GLOW - Static variable in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    turnCounter - Variable in class logic.BattleEngine
    Counts completed rounds.
    type - Variable in class component.Monster
    Monster type (normalized to 1..3).

    U

    ULT_BTN_IMG_PATH - Static variable in class gui.BattleScene

    Action buttons for the hero turn.

    ultCdMax - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Maximum cooldown value for ultimate.
    ultCdRemain - Variable in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Remaining cooldown turns for ultimate (0 means usable).
    ultDesc - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     
    ultimate(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Archer
    Uses the Archer's ultimate ability.
    ultimate(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Caster
    Uses the Caster's ultimate ability.
    ultimate(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Fighter
    Uses the Fighter's ultimate ability.
    ultimate(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Uses the hero's ultimate action.
    ultimate(Target) - Method in class component.heroes.Tank
    Uses the Tank's ultimate ability.
    ULTIMATE - Enum constant in enum class logic.SkillType
    Powerful hero ability with a longer cooldown and often stronger effects.
    ultName - Variable in class gui.BattleScene.SkillInfo
     
    Unit - Class in component
    Abstract base class representing a combat unit in the game.
    Unit(String, double, double, double) - Constructor for class component.Unit
    Constructs a new Unit with base combat stats.
    unitCardWithHpBar_Hero(double, boolean, Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds a hero card containing an HP bar and the hero sprite image.
    unitCardWithHpBar_Hero(double, boolean, Heroes) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    unitCardWithHpBar_Monster(String, double, boolean, Element, Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Builds a monster card containing an HP bar and the monster sprite image.
    unitCardWithHpBar_Monster(String, double, boolean, Element, Monster) - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    updateColor(double) - Method in class gui.BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Updates the fill color based on current HP percentage.
    updateColor(double) - Method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    updateSkillDescription() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Updates the skill description panel based on: the currently active hero and BattleScene.selectedSkillType.
    updateStageCounter(GameEngine) - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Updates the top-center stage counter text from the game engine.
    updateUnitsAnimated() - Static method in class gui.BattleScene
    Updates unit HP bars and card visuals without rebuilding cards.
    updateUnitsAnimated() - Static method in class gui.BattleSceneTemp
     
    upgrade() - Method in class component.heroes.Heroes
    Upgrades hero base stats by fixed increments.
    UPGRADE - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    State where the player upgrades a hero after winning a battle before progressing to the next stage.
    upgradeHero - Static variable in class logic.GameEngine
    Selected hero to be upgraded, or null if no hero is selected.
    UpgradeScene - Class in gui
    The UpgradeScene class renders the hero upgrade screen that appears after victory.
    UpgradeScene() - Constructor for class gui.UpgradeScene
     
    upgradingHero() - Static method in class logic.GameEngine
    Upgrades the selected hero if one has been chosen.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class component.Element
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class logic.SkillType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class logic.TargetType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.Character
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.GameState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.SkillType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.TargetType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VICTORY - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    State reached when all monsters in the current stage are defeated.
    VictoryScene - Class in gui
    The VictoryScene class displays the victory screen after the player wins a battle.
    VictoryScene() - Constructor for class gui.VictoryScene
     

    W

    WATER - Enum constant in enum class component.Element
     
    WIN_TURN - Enum constant in enum class logic.BattleStage
    Stage indicating that all monsters are defeated and the player wins the battle.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
